register.note: Forced 0 and earned: hero.png is a text masthead (title + 3 lines + metadata card) with the right two-thirds of the canvas empty, where Ciechanowski opens on a saturated blue band and a rendered 3D watch.

Forced 0: there is no hero, so nothing in the opening depicts the mechanism the way Seeing-Theory draws pink squared-error squares on the residuals — our overfit/penalty mechanism only appears after scrolling into See.

The plot self-labels (header 'NO PENALTY — OVERFITTING', titled error-vs-lambda inset with 'best lambda', legend) but carries no callouts pointing at the overfit lobe or the train/test gap, so meaning still lives in the left prose column — short of Distill's panels that bake the math condition into each caption.

Calm, AA-clean, and never harsh, but flat: thin 2D SVG strokes and large dead canvas (bare hero right side, empty left column below short See prose) with no depth or color-keyed delight, versus Ciechanowski's shaded 3D render and hue-bound sliders.

A live lambda slider re-renders the curve and updates the train/test readout (explanatory, not decorative), but there is no visible transport/stepping and statics can't confirm tweened transitions, so it reads as a competent live control rather than 3B1B's cinematic term-by-term build.

The lab grammar is held exactly — blue prediction line, amber observed points, red reserved for honest test error, purple penalty lambda — with no all-red dilution and a bound colored 'Regularisation' term, carrying more semantic load cleanly than R2D3's two-hue scatter.

hero.note: A hero would need the existing degree-12 overfit curve (blue fit, amber train/test split, error-vs-lambda U) composed full-width above the prose with one annotated wiggle lobe and residual, legible as a thumbnail.

assessment.note: The Check keeps a hands-on lab task (B4, 'completed with your hands, not a click') and a persistent live dial, but the closing transfer item (B5) is still a 3-option MCQ rather than an interactive or open prompt.

blocking: No composed hero exists; promote the See/Run overfit plot into a full-width, labeled hero above the masthead prose so both hero dimensions become judgeable.
Add in-figure callouts to the overfit plot (mark the wiggle lobe and the train/test 'honest gap') so meaning leaves the prose column.
Give the canvas finish and depth and cut the dead air (bare hero right side, empty See left column) to move atmosphere past competent.
Make the B5 transfer item interactive/open (set lambda on the dial to repair the underfit, then explain) instead of a 3-option MCQ.
verdict.summary: Colour discipline matches the bar (3), but with no hero and annotation/atmosphere/motion all at 2 the exhibit reads as a clean blog post with a competent figure, not Distill/3B1B — register does not clear 3.
